title: notifications-in-app — subscribed events
description: The primary contract with core. Subscribes to NotificationDispatched (filtered to channel=in_app) + translates into a DB write + Reverb broadcast.

listeners.purpose: Dispatches BroadcastInAppNotificationJob. That job creates the NotificationDelivery row (state=delivered) via core's DispatchGateway + emits the Reverb broadcast. Filter ensures we don't fire for non-in-app channels.
Emits a `notifications.seen` broadcast on `user.{id}.notifications` so other open tabs (SPA + mobile web) reflect the seen state without a server round-trip.
Emits a `notifications.archived` broadcast so open tabs remove the row from the visible inbox.
